problem_text_cn: 1450 测量固体的热膨胀系数。[可供仪器和用具] 线膨胀仪、蒸气发生器、金属试棒、千分尺、米尺、光杠杆、温度计等。[要求] (1) 写出测量金属热膨胀系数原理及公式；(2) 写出实验方法；(3) 测量黄铜材料在室温至 $100\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$ 时的线膨胀系数。
problem_text_en: 1450 Measure the thermal expansion coefficient of solids. [Available instruments and tools] Linear expansion instrument, steam generator, metal test bar, micrometer, meter stick, optical lever, thermometer, etc. [Requirements] (1) Write down the principle and formula for measuring the linear thermal expansion coefficient of metals; (2) Write down the experimental method; (3) Measure the linear thermal expansion coefficient of brass from room temperature to $100\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$.
img_cn: 图1450_1：光杠杆测线膨胀装置及数据处理
img_en: Fig. 1450_1: Optical lever linear expansion measuring device and data processing
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】金属棒受热伸长 $\Delta L = L_1 \alpha (t_2 - t_1)$，光杠杆测微小伸长 $\Delta L = \frac{bd}{2D}$，联立得 $\alpha = \frac{bd}{2DL(t_2 - t_1)}$。代入数据：$L = 49.80\ \mathrm{cm}$，$t_1 = 26.2\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$t_2 = 98.6\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$d = 1.84\ \mathrm{cm}$，$D = 103.3\ \mathrm{cm}$，$b = 7.40\ \mathrm{cm}$，得 $\alpha = 1.83 \times 10^{-5}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}$（$26.2\ \mathrm{^\circ C} \sim 98.6\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$）。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Metal bar expands when heated: $\Delta L = L_1 \alpha (t_2 - t_1)$. Optical lever measures small elongation $\Delta L = \frac{bd}{2D}$, leading to $\alpha = \frac{bd}{2DL(t_2 - t_1)}$. Substituting data: $L = 49.80\ \mathrm{cm}$, $t_1 = 26.2\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $t_2 = 98.6\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $d = 1.84\ \mathrm{cm}$, $D = 103.3\ \mathrm{cm}$, $b = 7.40\ \mathrm{cm}$, get $\alpha = 1.83 \times 10^{-5}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}$ ($26.2\ \mathrm{^\circ C} \sim 98.6\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$).
problem_answer: 黄铜线膨胀系数：$\boldsymbol{1.83 \times 10^{-5}\ \mathrm{(^\circ C)^{-1}}}$（$26.2\ \mathrm{^\circ C} \sim 98.6\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$）；测量关键：光杠杆测微小伸长，消除视差。
